what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-assets channel image asset: a PNG icon named 'image (60)' stored as a versioned blob with provenance, timestamps, and empty links.
observations: The asset is an image/png blob referenced by blob://b2:26c7a03ecebe6868e64f38f7068185ae
Width and height are both 0, despite being an image record
It has a single version (v1) with identical blob, mime, and zero dimensions
The alt text is an empty string
The source field is 'dragnet' and the author session is 'ch-3mpkjg3r'
standouts: Zero width/height for an image asset
Empty alt text on a design asset
Single-version record with no downstream links
concerns: Image dimensions are 0x0, which suggests the metadata was not extracted or the asset is not actually processed
Alt text is empty, which may reduce accessibility/discoverability
No links or usage context are provided, so the asset's role in the design system is unclear
notes: A bare, versioned metadata stub for a PNG icon in the design-assets channel, notable mainly for missing dimensions and alt text.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What does the 'dragnet' source indicate about how this asset was ingested?
Where or how is this icon intended to be used, given the empty links array?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears meant to catalog a design-assets icon image, but the actual content is an incomplete metadata record because image dimensions and alt text are not populated.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to register a versioned, discoverable design asset in a channel ledger so it can be referenced by blob ID and channel path.
contribution: It contributes a versioned, content-addressed metadata record for a PNG icon asset, including its channel membership, ingestion source, author session, and creation timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger entry for a design-assets PNG icon named 'image (60)' with a single blob-backed version, zero recorded dimensions, empty alt text, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a versioned icon asset from the design-assets channel with provenance and blob reference.
